1	# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
2	"""Coordinator for managing the multi-stage pipeline."""
3	
4	import asyncio
5	import logging
6	import uuid
7	from collections.abc import Callable, Sequence
8	from dataclasses import dataclass, field
9	from typing import Any, AsyncIterator
10	
11	from sglang_omni.pipeline.control_plane import CoordinatorControlPlane
12	from sglang_omni.profiler.event_recorder import emit as _emit_event
13	from sglang_omni.proto import (
14	    AbortMessage,
15	    AdminMessage,
16	    AdminOperation,
17	    AdminResult,
18	    AdminResultMessage,
19	    CompleteMessage,
20	    OmniRequest,
21	    RequestInfo,
22	    RequestState,
23	    StageInfo,
24	    StagePayload,
25	    StreamMessage,
26	    SubmitMessage,
27	    is_update_action,
28	)
29	
30	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
31	
32	
33	@dataclass
34	class _AdminPendingOperation:
35	    expected_stages: set[str]
36	    action: str
37	    results: dict[str, AdminResult] = field(default_factory=dict)
38	    future: asyncio.Future | None = None
39	
40	
41	class Coordinator:
42	    """Central coordinator for the multi-stage pipeline.
43	
44	    Responsibilities:
45	    - Register stages
46	    - Submit requests to entry stage
47	    - Track request state
48	    - Handle completions
49	    - Broadcast abort signals
50	    """
51	
52	    def __init__(
53	        self,
54	        completion_endpoint: str,
55	        abort_endpoint: str,
56	        entry_stage: str,
57	        terminal_stages: list[str] | None = None,
58	        terminal_stages_resolver: (
59	            Callable[[OmniRequest], list[str] | None] | None
60	        ) = None,
61	    ):
62	        """Initialize coordinator.
63	
64	        Args:
65	            completion_endpoint: ZMQ endpoint to receive completions
66	            abort_endpoint: ZMQ endpoint for abort broadcasts
67	            entry_stage: Name of the entry stage for new requests
68	            terminal_stages: Terminal stage names. When multiple are given,
69	                the coordinator waits for all to complete before resolving.
70	        """
71	        self.entry_stage = entry_stage
72	        self._terminal_stages: set[str] = (
73	            set(terminal_stages) if terminal_stages else set()
74	        )
75	        self._terminal_stages_resolver = terminal_stages_resolver
76	        self._partial_results: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}
77	
78	        # Control plane
79	        self.control_plane = CoordinatorControlPlane(
80	            completion_endpoint=completion_endpoint,
81	            abort_endpoint=abort_endpoint,
82	        )
83	
84	        # Stage registry
85	        self._stages: dict[str, StageInfo] = {}
86	
87	        # Request tracking
88	        self._requests: dict[str, RequestInfo] = {}
89	        self._completion_futures: dict[str, asyncio.Future] = {}
90	        self._stream_queues: dict[
91	            str, asyncio.Queue[CompleteMessage | StreamMessage]
92	        ] = {}
93	        self._admin_ops: dict[str, _AdminPendingOperation] = {}
94	        self._admin_lock = asyncio.Lock()
95	
96	        # State
97	        self._running = False
98	        self._fatal_error: str | None = None
99	
100	    def register_stage(self, name: str, endpoint: str) -> None:
101	        """Register a stage.
102	
103	        Args:
104	            name: Stage name
105	            endpoint: ZMQ endpoint for the stage
106	        """
107	        self._stages[name] = StageInfo(name=name, control_endpoint=endpoint)
108	        logger.info("Coordinator registered stage: %s at %s", name, endpoint)
109	
110	    async def start(self) -> None:
111	        """Start the coordinator."""
112	        await self.control_plane.start()
113	        self._running = True
114	        logger.info("Coordinator started")
115	
116	    async def stop(self) -> None:
117	        """Stop the coordinator."""
118	        self._running = False
119	        self.control_plane.close()
120	        logger.info("Coordinator stopped")
121	
122	    async def fail_pending_requests(self, error: BaseException | str) -> None:
123	        """Fail all requests currently owned by the coordinator."""
124	        self._running = False
125	        message = str(error)
126	        self._fatal_error = message
127	        for request_id, info in list(self._requests.items()):
128	            info.state = RequestState.FAILED
129	            info.error = message
130	            self._reject_completion_future(request_id, RuntimeError(message))
131	            queue = self._stream_queues.get(request_id)
132	            if queue is not None:
133	                await queue.put(
134	                    CompleteMessage(
135	                        request_id=request_id,
136	                        from_stage="coordinator",
137	                        success=False,
138	                        error=message,
139	                    )
140	                )
141	        self._requests.clear()
142	        self._partial_results.clear()
143	
144	    async def shutdown_stages(self) -> None:
145	        """Send shutdown signal to all registered stages."""
146	        for name, info in self._stages.items():
147	            try:
148	                await self.control_plane.send_shutdown(name, info.control_endpoint)
149	                logger.info("Sent shutdown to stage: %s", name)
150	            except Exception as e:
151	                logger.warning("Failed to send shutdown to stage %s: %s", name, e)
152	
153	    async def admin(
154	        self,
155	        action: str,
156	        payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
157	        *,
158	        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
159	        timeout_s: float = 60.0,
160	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
161	        """Run an administrative operation against one or more stages."""
162	        if not self._running:
163	            raise RuntimeError("Coordinator is not running")
164	
165	        target_stages = self._resolve_admin_stages(stages)
166	        if not target_stages:
167	            raise ValueError("No stages registered for admin operation")
168	
169	        op_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
170	        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
171	        pending = _AdminPendingOperation(
172	            expected_stages=set(target_stages),
173	            action=action,
174	            future=loop.create_future(),
175	        )
176	        operation = AdminOperation(
177	            op_id=op_id,
178	            action=action,
179	            payload=dict(payload or {}),
180	            target_stages=list(target_stages),
181	            timeout_s=timeout_s,
182	        )
183	
184	        async with self._admin_lock:
185	            self._admin_ops[op_id] = pending
186	            try:
187	                for stage_name in target_stages:
188	                    info = self._stages[stage_name]
189	                    await self.control_plane.send_admin(
190	                        stage_name,
191	                        info.control_endpoint,
192	                        AdminMessage(operation=operation),
193	                    )
194	
195	                assert pending.future is not None
196	                results = await asyncio.wait_for(pending.future, timeout=timeout_s)
197	            finally:
198	                self._admin_ops.pop(op_id, None)
199	
200	        return self._aggregate_admin_results(
201	            op_id=op_id,
202	            action=action,
203	            results=list(results.values()),
204	        )
205	
206	    async def model_info(
207	        self,
208	        *,
209	        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
210	        timeout_s: float = 30.0,
211	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
212	        return await self.admin(
213	            "model_info",
214	            stages=stages,
215	            timeout_s=timeout_s,
216	        )
217	
218	    async def pause_generation(
219	        self,
220	        payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
221	        *,
222	        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
223	        timeout_s: float = 60.0,
224	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
225	        return await self.admin(
226	            "pause_generation",
227	            payload,
228	            stages=stages,
229	            timeout_s=timeout_s,
230	        )
231	
232	    async def continue_generation(
233	        self,
234	        payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
235	        *,
236	        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
237	        timeout_s: float = 60.0,
238	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
239	        return await self.admin(
240	            "continue_generation",
241	            payload,
242	            stages=stages,
243	            timeout_s=timeout_s,
244	        )
245	
246	    async def update_weights_from_disk(
247	        self,
248	        payload: dict[str, Any],
249	        *,
250	        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
251	        timeout_s: float = 120.0,
252	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
253	        return await self.admin(
254	            "update_weights_from_disk",
255	            payload,
256	            stages=stages,
257	            timeout_s=timeout_s,
258	        )
259	
260	    async def init_weights_update_group(
261	        self,
262	        payload: dict[str, Any],
263	        *,
264	        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
265	        timeout_s: float = 300.0,
266	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
267	        return await self.admin(
268	            "init_weights_update_group",
269	            payload,
270	            stages=stages,
271	            timeout_s=timeout_s,
272	        )
273	
274	    async def destroy_weights_update_group(
275	        self,
276	        payload: dict[str, Any],
277	        *,
278	        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
279	        timeout_s: float = 300.0,
280	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
281	        return await self.admin(
282	            "destroy_weights_update_group",
283	            payload,
284	            stages=stages,
285	            timeout_s=timeout_s,
286	        )
287	
288	    async def update_weights_from_distributed(
289	        self,
290	        payload: dict[str, Any],
291	        *,
292	        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
293	        timeout_s: float = 300.0,
294	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
295	        return await self.admin(
296	            "update_weights_from_distributed",
297	            payload,
298	            stages=stages,
299	            timeout_s=timeout_s,
300	        )
301	
302	    async def weights_checker(
303	        self,
304	        payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
305	        *,
306	        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
307	        timeout_s: float = 120.0,
308	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
309	        return await self.admin(
310	            "weights_checker",
311	            payload,
312	            stages=stages,
313	            timeout_s=timeout_s,
314	        )
315	
316	    async def submit(self, request_id: str, request: OmniRequest | Any) -> Any:
317	        """Submit a request to the pipeline and wait for completion."""
318	        await self._submit_request(request_id, request)
319	
320	        future = self._completion_futures[request_id]
321	        try:
322	            result = await future
323	            return result
324	        finally:
325	            self._completion_futures.pop(request_id, None)
326	
327	    async def stream(
328	        self, request_id: str, request: OmniRequest | Any
329	    ) -> AsyncIterator[CompleteMessage | StreamMessage]:
330	        """Submit a request and yield stream events until completion."""
331	        if request_id in self._stream_queues:
332	            raise ValueError(f"Request {request_id} already streaming")
333	
334	        queue: asyncio.Queue[CompleteMessage | StreamMessage] = asyncio.Queue()
335	        self._stream_queues[request_id] = queue
336	
337	        try:
338	            await self._submit_request(request_id, request)
339	            expected_terminal_stages = self._expected_terminal_stages(request_id)
340	
341	            completed_stages: set[str] = set()
342	            while True:
343	                msg = await queue.get()
344	                if isinstance(msg, CompleteMessage):
345	                    if not msg.success:
346	                        raise RuntimeError(msg.error or "Unknown error")
347	                    yield msg
348	                    completed_stages.add(msg.from_stage)
349	                    if (
350	                        not expected_terminal_stages
351	                        or completed_stages >= expected_terminal_stages
352	                    ):
353	                        return
354	                else:
355	                    yield msg
356	        finally:
357	            self._stream_queues.pop(request_id, None)
358	            self._completion_futures.pop(request_id, None)
359	
360	    async def _submit_request(
361	        self, request_id: str, request: OmniRequest | Any
362	    ) -> None:
363	        """Submit a request without waiting for completion."""
364	        if self._fatal_error is not None:
365	            raise RuntimeError(self._fatal_error)
366	        if request_id in self._requests:
367	            raise ValueError(f"Request {request_id} already exists")
368	
369	        if self.entry_stage not in self._stages:
370	            raise ValueError(f"Entry stage {self.entry_stage} not registered")
371	
372	        if not isinstance(request, OmniRequest):
373	            request = OmniRequest(inputs=request)
374	
375	        # Track request
376	        self._requests[request_id] = RequestInfo(
377	            request_id=request_id,
378	            state=RequestState.PENDING,
379	            current_stage=self.entry_stage,
380	            terminal_stages=self._resolve_terminal_stages(request),
381	        )
382	
383	        # Create future for completion
384	        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
385	        future: asyncio.Future = loop.create_future()
386	        self._completion_futures[request_id] = future
387	
388	        payload = StagePayload(
389	            request_id=request_id,
390	            request=request,
391	            data={"raw_inputs": request.inputs},
392	        )
393	
394	        _emit_event(
395	            request_id=request_id,
396	            stage="coordinator",
397	            event_name="request_admission",
398	            metadata={"entry_stage": self.entry_stage},
399	        )
400	
401	        # Submit to entry stage
402	        entry_info = self._stages[self.entry_stage]
403	        await self.control_plane.submit_to_stage(
404	            self.entry_stage,
405	            entry_info.control_endpoint,
406	            SubmitMessage(request_id=request_id, data=payload),
407	        )
408	
409	        # Update state
410	        self._requests[request_id].state = RequestState.RUNNING
411	
412	        logger.info(
413	            "Coordinator submitted req=%s to %s at %s",
414	            request_id,
415	            self.entry_stage,
416	            entry_info.control_endpoint,
417	        )
418	
419	    def _reject_completion_future(self, request_id: str, exc: BaseException) -> None:
420	        # Note: (Akazaakane) Non-streaming callers await the completion future,
421	        # so errors must be propagated with set_exception(). Streaming callers
422	        # receive errors through the stream queue and never await that future;
423	        # cancel it instead to avoid "Future exception was never retrieved".
424	        future = self._completion_futures.get(request_id)
425	        if future is None or future.done():
426	            return
427	        if request_id in self._stream_queues:
428	            future.cancel()
429	        else:
430	            future.set_exception(exc)
431	
432	    async def abort(self, request_id: str) -> bool:
433	        """Abort a request.
434	
435	        Args:
436	            request_id: Request to abort
437	
438	        Returns:
439	            True if aborted, False if not found
440	        """
441	        if request_id not in self._requests:
442	            return False
443	
444	        info = self._requests[request_id]
445	        if info.state in (
446	            RequestState.COMPLETED,
447	            RequestState.FAILED,
448	            RequestState.ABORTED,
449	        ):
450	            return False
451	
452	        # Broadcast abort to all stages
453	        await self.control_plane.broadcast_abort(AbortMessage(request_id=request_id))
454	
455	        # Update state
456	        info.state = RequestState.ABORTED
457	
458	        # Resolve future with error
459	        self._reject_completion_future(
460	            request_id, asyncio.CancelledError(f"Request {request_id} aborted")
461	        )
462	        if request_id in self._stream_queues:
463	            await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(
464	                CompleteMessage(
465	                    request_id=request_id,
466	                    from_stage="coordinator",
467	                    success=False,
468	                    error="aborted",
469	                )
470	            )
471	
472	        # Cleanup request tracking
473	        self._requests.pop(request_id, None)
474	        self._partial_results.pop(request_id, None)
475	
476	        logger.info("Coordinator aborted req=%s", request_id)
477	        return True
478	
479	    async def run_completion_loop(self) -> None:
480	        """Run the completion receiving loop.
481	
482	        This should be run as a background task.
483	        """
484	        try:
485	            while self._running:
486	                msg = await self.control_plane.recv_event()
487	                if isinstance(msg, StreamMessage):
488	                    await self._handle_stream(msg)
489	                elif isinstance(msg, AdminResultMessage):
490	                    self._handle_admin_result(msg.result)
491	                else:
492	                    await self._handle_completion(msg)
493	        except asyncio.CancelledError:
494	            logger.info("Coordinator completion loop cancelled")
495	        except Exception as e:
496	            logger.error("Coordinator completion loop error: %s", e)
497	            raise
498	
499	    async def _handle_completion(self, msg: CompleteMessage) -> None:
500	        """Handle a completion message from a stage."""
501	        request_id = msg.request_id
502	        logger.debug(
503	            "Coordinator received completion: req=%s from %s success=%s",
504	            request_id,
505	            msg.from_stage,
506	            msg.success,
507	        )
508	        _emit_event(
509	            request_id=request_id,
510	            stage="coordinator",
511	            event_name="terminal_response",
512	            metadata={
513	                "from_stage": msg.from_stage,
514	                "success": msg.success,
515	            },
516	        )
517	
518	        if request_id not in self._requests:
519	            logger.warning(
520	                "Coordinator received completion for unknown req=%s", request_id
521	            )
522	            return
523	
524	        info = self._requests[request_id]
525	
526	        # Fail-fast: any terminal failure -> fail entire request
527	        if not msg.success:
528	            info.state = RequestState.FAILED
529	            info.error = msg.error
530	            await self.control_plane.broadcast_abort(
531	                AbortMessage(request_id=request_id)
532	            )
533	            self._partial_results.pop(request_id, None)
534	            self._reject_completion_future(
535	                request_id, RuntimeError(msg.error or "Unknown error")
536	            )
537	            if request_id in self._stream_queues:
538	                await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(msg)
539	            self._requests.pop(request_id, None)
540	            return
541	
542	        expected_terminal_stages = self._expected_terminal_stages(request_id)
543	        if expected_terminal_stages and msg.from_stage not in expected_terminal_stages:
544	            logger.debug(
545	                "Coordinator ignoring completion from inactive terminal: "
546	                "req=%s stage=%s expected=%s",
547	                request_id,
548	                msg.from_stage,
549	                sorted(expected_terminal_stages),
550	            )
551	            return
552	
553	        # Single active terminal (original behavior) or no terminal_stages configured
554	        if len(expected_terminal_stages) <= 1:
555	            info.state = RequestState.COMPLETED
556	            info.result = msg.result
557	            if request_id in self._completion_futures:
558	                future = self._completion_futures[request_id]
559	                if not future.done():
560	                    future.set_result(msg.result)
561	            if request_id in self._stream_queues:
562	                await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(msg)
563	            self._requests.pop(request_id, None)
564	            return
565	
566	        # Multi-terminal: collect partial results
567	        partials = self._partial_results.setdefault(request_id, {})
568	        partials[msg.from_stage] = msg.result
569	
570	        # Forward stream completion per-stage
571	        if request_id in self._stream_queues:
572	            await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(msg)
573	
574	        if set(partials) < expected_terminal_stages:
575	            return  # still waiting
576	
577	        # All terminal stages done -> merge and resolve
578	        merged = dict(partials)
579	        self._partial_results.pop(request_id)
580	        info.state = RequestState.COMPLETED
581	        info.result = merged
582	
583	        if request_id in self._completion_futures:
584	            future = self._completion_futures[request_id]
585	            if not future.done():
586	                future.set_result(merged)
587	        self._requests.pop(request_id, None)
588	
589	    async def _handle_stream(self, msg: StreamMessage) -> None:
590	        """Handle a stream chunk from a stage."""
591	        request_id = msg.request_id
592	        if request_id not in self._stream_queues:
593	            return
594	        _emit_event(
595	            request_id=request_id,
596	            stage="coordinator",
597	            event_name="coordinator_stream_received",
598	            metadata={
599	                "from_stage": msg.from_stage,
600	                "chunk_id": msg.chunk_id,
601	                "modality": msg.modality,
602	            },
603	        )
604	        _emit_event(
605	            request_id=request_id,
606	            stage="coordinator",
607	            event_name="stage_stream_chunk_received",
608	            metadata={
609	                "from_stage": msg.from_stage,
610	                "chunk_id": msg.chunk_id,
611	                "modality": msg.modality,
612	            },
613	        )
614	        await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(msg)
615	
616	    def _handle_admin_result(self, result: AdminResult) -> None:
617	        pending = self._admin_ops.get(result.op_id)
618	        if pending is None:
619	            logger.warning(
620	                "Coordinator received admin result for unknown op=%s stage=%s",
621	                result.op_id,
622	                result.stage,
623	            )
624	            return
625	        pending.results[result.stage] = result
626	        if (
627	            pending.future is not None
628	            and pending.results.keys() >= pending.expected_stages
629	        ):
630	            if not pending.future.done():
631	                pending.future.set_result(dict(pending.results))
632	
633	    def _resolve_admin_stages(self, stages: Sequence[str] | None) -> list[str]:
634	        if stages is None:
635	            return sorted(self._stages)
636	        resolved = list(stages)
637	        unknown = sorted(set(resolved) - set(self._stages))
638	        if unknown:
639	            raise ValueError(f"Unknown admin target stage(s): {unknown}")
640	        return resolved
641	
642	    def _aggregate_admin_results(
643	        self,
644	        *,
645	        op_id: str,
646	        action: str,
647	        results: list[AdminResult],
648	    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
649	        updated_results = [
650	            item
651	            for item in results
652	            if not item.data.get("skipped") and not item.data.get("unsupported")
653	        ]
654	        if is_update_action(action):
655	            success = bool(updated_results) and all(
656	                item.success for item in updated_results
657	            )
658	        else:
659	            success = all(item.success for item in results)
660	
661	        errors = [item.error for item in results if item.error]
662	        if success:
663	            message = "ok"
664	        elif errors:
665	            message = "; ".join(errors)
666	        else:
667	            message = "admin operation did not complete successfully"
668	
669	        return {
670	            "op_id": op_id,
671	            "action": action,
672	            "success": success,
673	            "message": message,
674	            "results": [item.to_dict() for item in results],
675	        }
676	
677	    def get_request_info(self, request_id: str) -> RequestInfo | None:
678	        """Get info about a request."""
679	        return self._requests.get(request_id)
680	
681	    def _resolve_terminal_stages(self, request: OmniRequest) -> set[str]:
682	        if self._terminal_stages_resolver is None:
683	            return set(self._terminal_stages)
684	        resolved = self._terminal_stages_resolver(request)
685	        if resolved is None:
686	            return set(self._terminal_stages)
687	        if isinstance(resolved, str) or not isinstance(resolved, Sequence):
688	            raise ValueError(
689	                "terminal_stages_resolver must return a sequence of terminal "
690	                "stage names or None"
691	            )
692	        if not all(isinstance(stage, str) for stage in resolved):
693	            raise ValueError(
694	                "terminal_stages_resolver must return terminal stage names"
695	            )
696	        resolved_stages = set(resolved)
697	        if not resolved_stages:
698	            raise ValueError("terminal_stages_resolver returned no terminal stages")
699	        unknown = resolved_stages - self._terminal_stages
700	        if unknown:
701	            raise ValueError(
702	                "terminal_stages_resolver returned stages outside the static "
703	                f"terminal stages: {sorted(unknown)}. Allowed terminal stages: "
704	                f"{sorted(self._terminal_stages)}"
705	            )
706	        return resolved_stages
707	
708	    def _expected_terminal_stages(self, request_id: str) -> set[str]:
709	        info = self._requests.get(request_id)
710	        if info is None or info.terminal_stages is None:
711	            return set(self._terminal_stages)
712	        return info.terminal_stages
713	
714	    def health(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
715	        """Return health status."""
716	        state_counts = {}
717	        for info in self._requests.values():
718	            state = info.state.value
719	            state_counts[state] = state_counts.get(state, 0) + 1
720	
721	        return {
722	            "running": self._running,
723	            "stages": list(self._stages.keys()),
724	            "entry_stage": self.entry_stage,
725	            "total_requests": len(self._requests),
726	            "pending_completions": len(self._completion_futures),
727	            "request_states": state_counts,
728	        }
729	
730	
731	async def run_coordinator(
732	    completion_endpoint: str,
733	    abort_endpoint: str,
734	    entry_stage: str,
735	    stages: dict[str, str],  # name -> endpoint
736	    terminal_stages: list[str] | None = None,
737	    terminal_stages_resolver: Callable[[OmniRequest], list[str] | None] | None = None,
738	) -> Coordinator:
739	    """Create and start a coordinator.
740	
741	    Args:
742	        completion_endpoint: ZMQ endpoint to receive completions
743	        abort_endpoint: ZMQ endpoint for abort broadcasts
744	        entry_stage: Name of the entry stage
745	        stages: Dict of stage_name -> stage_endpoint
746	        terminal_stages: Optional list of terminal stage names for multi-terminal merge
747	
748	    Returns:
749	        Started Coordinator instance
750	    """
751	    coordinator = Coordinator(
752	        completion_endpoint=completion_endpoint,
753	        abort_endpoint=abort_endpoint,
754	        entry_stage=entry_stage,
755	        terminal_stages=terminal_stages,
756	        terminal_stages_resolver=terminal_stages_resolver,
757	    )
758	
759	    # Register stages
760	    for name, endpoint in stages.items():
761	        coordinator.register_stage(name, endpoint)
762	
763	    # Start
764	    await coordinator.start()
765	
766	    return coordinator
767

# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
"""Coordinator for managing the multi-stage pipeline."""

import asyncio
import logging
import uuid
from collections.abc import Callable, Sequence
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import Any, AsyncIterator

from sglang_omni.pipeline.control_plane import CoordinatorControlPlane
from sglang_omni.profiler.event_recorder import emit as _emit_event
from sglang_omni.proto import (
    AbortMessage,
    AdminMessage,
    AdminOperation,
    AdminResult,
    AdminResultMessage,
    CompleteMessage,
    OmniRequest,
    RequestInfo,
    RequestState,
    StageInfo,
    StagePayload,
    StreamMessage,
    SubmitMessage,
    is_update_action,
)

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


@dataclass
class _AdminPendingOperation:
    expected_stages: set[str]
    action: str
    results: dict[str, AdminResult] = field(default_factory=dict)
    future: asyncio.Future | None = None


class Coordinator:
    """Central coordinator for the multi-stage pipeline.

    Responsibilities:
    - Register stages
    - Submit requests to entry stage
    - Track request state
    - Handle completions
    - Broadcast abort signals
    """

    def __init__(
        self,
        completion_endpoint: str,
        abort_endpoint: str,
        entry_stage: str,
        terminal_stages: list[str] | None = None,
        terminal_stages_resolver: (
            Callable[[OmniRequest], list[str] | None] | None
        ) = None,
    ):
        """Initialize coordinator.

        Args:
            completion_endpoint: ZMQ endpoint to receive completions
            abort_endpoint: ZMQ endpoint for abort broadcasts
            entry_stage: Name of the entry stage for new requests
            terminal_stages: Terminal stage names. When multiple are given,
                the coordinator waits for all to complete before resolving.
        """
        self.entry_stage = entry_stage
        self._terminal_stages: set[str] = (
            set(terminal_stages) if terminal_stages else set()
        )
        self._terminal_stages_resolver = terminal_stages_resolver
        self._partial_results: dict[str, dict[str, Any]] = {}

        # Control plane
        self.control_plane = CoordinatorControlPlane(
            completion_endpoint=completion_endpoint,
            abort_endpoint=abort_endpoint,
        )

        # Stage registry
        self._stages: dict[str, StageInfo] = {}

        # Request tracking
        self._requests: dict[str, RequestInfo] = {}
        self._completion_futures: dict[str, asyncio.Future] = {}
        self._stream_queues: dict[
            str, asyncio.Queue[CompleteMessage | StreamMessage]
        ] = {}
        self._admin_ops: dict[str, _AdminPendingOperation] = {}
        self._admin_lock = asyncio.Lock()

        # State
        self._running = False
        self._fatal_error: str | None = None

    def register_stage(self, name: str, endpoint: str) -> None:
        """Register a stage.

        Args:
            name: Stage name
            endpoint: ZMQ endpoint for the stage
        """
        self._stages[name] = StageInfo(name=name, control_endpoint=endpoint)
        logger.info("Coordinator registered stage: %s at %s", name, endpoint)

    async def start(self) -> None:
        """Start the coordinator."""
        await self.control_plane.start()
        self._running = True
        logger.info("Coordinator started")

    async def stop(self) -> None:
        """Stop the coordinator."""
        self._running = False
        self.control_plane.close()
        logger.info("Coordinator stopped")

    async def fail_pending_requests(self, error: BaseException | str) -> None:
        """Fail all requests currently owned by the coordinator."""
        self._running = False
        message = str(error)
        self._fatal_error = message
        for request_id, info in list(self._requests.items()):
            info.state = RequestState.FAILED
            info.error = message
            self._reject_completion_future(request_id, RuntimeError(message))
            queue = self._stream_queues.get(request_id)
            if queue is not None:
                await queue.put(
                    CompleteMessage(
                        request_id=request_id,
                        from_stage="coordinator",
                        success=False,
                        error=message,
                    )
                )
        self._requests.clear()
        self._partial_results.clear()

    async def shutdown_stages(self) -> None:
        """Send shutdown signal to all registered stages."""
        for name, info in self._stages.items():
            try:
                await self.control_plane.send_shutdown(name, info.control_endpoint)
                logger.info("Sent shutdown to stage: %s", name)
            except Exception as e:
                logger.warning("Failed to send shutdown to stage %s: %s", name, e)

    async def admin(
        self,
        action: str,
        payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
        *,
        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
        timeout_s: float = 60.0,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        """Run an administrative operation against one or more stages."""
        if not self._running:
            raise RuntimeError("Coordinator is not running")

        target_stages = self._resolve_admin_stages(stages)
        if not target_stages:
            raise ValueError("No stages registered for admin operation")

        op_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
        pending = _AdminPendingOperation(
            expected_stages=set(target_stages),
            action=action,
            future=loop.create_future(),
        )
        operation = AdminOperation(
            op_id=op_id,
            action=action,
            payload=dict(payload or {}),
            target_stages=list(target_stages),
            timeout_s=timeout_s,
        )

        async with self._admin_lock:
            self._admin_ops[op_id] = pending
            try:
                for stage_name in target_stages:
                    info = self._stages[stage_name]
                    await self.control_plane.send_admin(
                        stage_name,
                        info.control_endpoint,
                        AdminMessage(operation=operation),
                    )

                assert pending.future is not None
                results = await asyncio.wait_for(pending.future, timeout=timeout_s)
            finally:
                self._admin_ops.pop(op_id, None)

        return self._aggregate_admin_results(
            op_id=op_id,
            action=action,
            results=list(results.values()),
        )

    async def model_info(
        self,
        *,
        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
        timeout_s: float = 30.0,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return await self.admin(
            "model_info",
            stages=stages,
            timeout_s=timeout_s,
        )

    async def pause_generation(
        self,
        payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
        *,
        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
        timeout_s: float = 60.0,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return await self.admin(
            "pause_generation",
            payload,
            stages=stages,
            timeout_s=timeout_s,
        )

    async def continue_generation(
        self,
        payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
        *,
        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
        timeout_s: float = 60.0,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return await self.admin(
            "continue_generation",
            payload,
            stages=stages,
            timeout_s=timeout_s,
        )

    async def update_weights_from_disk(
        self,
        payload: dict[str, Any],
        *,
        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
        timeout_s: float = 120.0,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return await self.admin(
            "update_weights_from_disk",
            payload,
            stages=stages,
            timeout_s=timeout_s,
        )

    async def init_weights_update_group(
        self,
        payload: dict[str, Any],
        *,
        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
        timeout_s: float = 300.0,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return await self.admin(
            "init_weights_update_group",
            payload,
            stages=stages,
            timeout_s=timeout_s,
        )

    async def destroy_weights_update_group(
        self,
        payload: dict[str, Any],
        *,
        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
        timeout_s: float = 300.0,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return await self.admin(
            "destroy_weights_update_group",
            payload,
            stages=stages,
            timeout_s=timeout_s,
        )

    async def update_weights_from_distributed(
        self,
        payload: dict[str, Any],
        *,
        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
        timeout_s: float = 300.0,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return await self.admin(
            "update_weights_from_distributed",
            payload,
            stages=stages,
            timeout_s=timeout_s,
        )

    async def weights_checker(
        self,
        payload: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
        *,
        stages: Sequence[str] | None = None,
        timeout_s: float = 120.0,
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        return await self.admin(
            "weights_checker",
            payload,
            stages=stages,
            timeout_s=timeout_s,
        )

    async def submit(self, request_id: str, request: OmniRequest | Any) -> Any:
        """Submit a request to the pipeline and wait for completion."""
        await self._submit_request(request_id, request)

        future = self._completion_futures[request_id]
        try:
            result = await future
            return result
        finally:
            self._completion_futures.pop(request_id, None)

    async def stream(
        self, request_id: str, request: OmniRequest | Any
    ) -> AsyncIterator[CompleteMessage | StreamMessage]:
        """Submit a request and yield stream events until completion."""
        if request_id in self._stream_queues:
            raise ValueError(f"Request {request_id} already streaming")

        queue: asyncio.Queue[CompleteMessage | StreamMessage] = asyncio.Queue()
        self._stream_queues[request_id] = queue

        try:
            await self._submit_request(request_id, request)
            expected_terminal_stages = self._expected_terminal_stages(request_id)

            completed_stages: set[str] = set()
            while True:
                msg = await queue.get()
                if isinstance(msg, CompleteMessage):
                    if not msg.success:
                        raise RuntimeError(msg.error or "Unknown error")
                    yield msg
                    completed_stages.add(msg.from_stage)
                    if (
                        not expected_terminal_stages
                        or completed_stages >= expected_terminal_stages
                    ):
                        return
                else:
                    yield msg
        finally:
            self._stream_queues.pop(request_id, None)
            self._completion_futures.pop(request_id, None)

    async def _submit_request(
        self, request_id: str, request: OmniRequest | Any
    ) -> None:
        """Submit a request without waiting for completion."""
        if self._fatal_error is not None:
            raise RuntimeError(self._fatal_error)
        if request_id in self._requests:
            raise ValueError(f"Request {request_id} already exists")

        if self.entry_stage not in self._stages:
            raise ValueError(f"Entry stage {self.entry_stage} not registered")

        if not isinstance(request, OmniRequest):
            request = OmniRequest(inputs=request)

        # Track request
        self._requests[request_id] = RequestInfo(
            request_id=request_id,
            state=RequestState.PENDING,
            current_stage=self.entry_stage,
            terminal_stages=self._resolve_terminal_stages(request),
        )

        # Create future for completion
        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
        future: asyncio.Future = loop.create_future()
        self._completion_futures[request_id] = future

        payload = StagePayload(
            request_id=request_id,
            request=request,
            data={"raw_inputs": request.inputs},
        )

        _emit_event(
            request_id=request_id,
            stage="coordinator",
            event_name="request_admission",
            metadata={"entry_stage": self.entry_stage},
        )

        # Submit to entry stage
        entry_info = self._stages[self.entry_stage]
        await self.control_plane.submit_to_stage(
            self.entry_stage,
            entry_info.control_endpoint,
            SubmitMessage(request_id=request_id, data=payload),
        )

        # Update state
        self._requests[request_id].state = RequestState.RUNNING

        logger.info(
            "Coordinator submitted req=%s to %s at %s",
            request_id,
            self.entry_stage,
            entry_info.control_endpoint,
        )

    def _reject_completion_future(self, request_id: str, exc: BaseException) -> None:
        # Note: (Akazaakane) Non-streaming callers await the completion future,
        # so errors must be propagated with set_exception(). Streaming callers
        # receive errors through the stream queue and never await that future;
        # cancel it instead to avoid "Future exception was never retrieved".
        future = self._completion_futures.get(request_id)
        if future is None or future.done():
            return
        if request_id in self._stream_queues:
            future.cancel()
        else:
            future.set_exception(exc)

    async def abort(self, request_id: str) -> bool:
        """Abort a request.

        Args:
            request_id: Request to abort

        Returns:
            True if aborted, False if not found
        """
        if request_id not in self._requests:
            return False

        info = self._requests[request_id]
        if info.state in (
            RequestState.COMPLETED,
            RequestState.FAILED,
            RequestState.ABORTED,
        ):
            return False

        # Broadcast abort to all stages
        await self.control_plane.broadcast_abort(AbortMessage(request_id=request_id))

        # Update state
        info.state = RequestState.ABORTED

        # Resolve future with error
        self._reject_completion_future(
            request_id, asyncio.CancelledError(f"Request {request_id} aborted")
        )
        if request_id in self._stream_queues:
            await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(
                CompleteMessage(
                    request_id=request_id,
                    from_stage="coordinator",
                    success=False,
                    error="aborted",
                )
            )

        # Cleanup request tracking
        self._requests.pop(request_id, None)
        self._partial_results.pop(request_id, None)

        logger.info("Coordinator aborted req=%s", request_id)
        return True

    async def run_completion_loop(self) -> None:
        """Run the completion receiving loop.

        This should be run as a background task.
        """
        try:
            while self._running:
                msg = await self.control_plane.recv_event()
                if isinstance(msg, StreamMessage):
                    await self._handle_stream(msg)
                elif isinstance(msg, AdminResultMessage):
                    self._handle_admin_result(msg.result)
                else:
                    await self._handle_completion(msg)
        except asyncio.CancelledError:
            logger.info("Coordinator completion loop cancelled")
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error("Coordinator completion loop error: %s", e)
            raise

    async def _handle_completion(self, msg: CompleteMessage) -> None:
        """Handle a completion message from a stage."""
        request_id = msg.request_id
        logger.debug(
            "Coordinator received completion: req=%s from %s success=%s",
            request_id,
            msg.from_stage,
            msg.success,
        )
        _emit_event(
            request_id=request_id,
            stage="coordinator",
            event_name="terminal_response",
            metadata={
                "from_stage": msg.from_stage,
                "success": msg.success,
            },
        )

        if request_id not in self._requests:
            logger.warning(
                "Coordinator received completion for unknown req=%s", request_id
            )
            return

        info = self._requests[request_id]

        # Fail-fast: any terminal failure -> fail entire request
        if not msg.success:
            info.state = RequestState.FAILED
            info.error = msg.error
            await self.control_plane.broadcast_abort(
                AbortMessage(request_id=request_id)
            )
            self._partial_results.pop(request_id, None)
            self._reject_completion_future(
                request_id, RuntimeError(msg.error or "Unknown error")
            )
            if request_id in self._stream_queues:
                await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(msg)
            self._requests.pop(request_id, None)
            return

        expected_terminal_stages = self._expected_terminal_stages(request_id)
        if expected_terminal_stages and msg.from_stage not in expected_terminal_stages:
            logger.debug(
                "Coordinator ignoring completion from inactive terminal: "
                "req=%s stage=%s expected=%s",
                request_id,
                msg.from_stage,
                sorted(expected_terminal_stages),
            )
            return

        # Single active terminal (original behavior) or no terminal_stages configured
        if len(expected_terminal_stages) <= 1:
            info.state = RequestState.COMPLETED
            info.result = msg.result
            if request_id in self._completion_futures:
                future = self._completion_futures[request_id]
                if not future.done():
                    future.set_result(msg.result)
            if request_id in self._stream_queues:
                await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(msg)
            self._requests.pop(request_id, None)
            return

        # Multi-terminal: collect partial results
        partials = self._partial_results.setdefault(request_id, {})
        partials[msg.from_stage] = msg.result

        # Forward stream completion per-stage
        if request_id in self._stream_queues:
            await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(msg)

        if set(partials) < expected_terminal_stages:
            return  # still waiting

        # All terminal stages done -> merge and resolve
        merged = dict(partials)
        self._partial_results.pop(request_id)
        info.state = RequestState.COMPLETED
        info.result = merged

        if request_id in self._completion_futures:
            future = self._completion_futures[request_id]
            if not future.done():
                future.set_result(merged)
        self._requests.pop(request_id, None)

    async def _handle_stream(self, msg: StreamMessage) -> None:
        """Handle a stream chunk from a stage."""
        request_id = msg.request_id
        if request_id not in self._stream_queues:
            return
        _emit_event(
            request_id=request_id,
            stage="coordinator",
            event_name="coordinator_stream_received",
            metadata={
                "from_stage": msg.from_stage,
                "chunk_id": msg.chunk_id,
                "modality": msg.modality,
            },
        )
        _emit_event(
            request_id=request_id,
            stage="coordinator",
            event_name="stage_stream_chunk_received",
            metadata={
                "from_stage": msg.from_stage,
                "chunk_id": msg.chunk_id,
                "modality": msg.modality,
            },
        )
        await self._stream_queues[request_id].put(msg)

    def _handle_admin_result(self, result: AdminResult) -> None:
        pending = self._admin_ops.get(result.op_id)
        if pending is None:
            logger.warning(
                "Coordinator received admin result for unknown op=%s stage=%s",
                result.op_id,
                result.stage,
            )
            return
        pending.results[result.stage] = result
        if (
            pending.future is not None
            and pending.results.keys() >= pending.expected_stages
        ):
            if not pending.future.done():
                pending.future.set_result(dict(pending.results))

    def _resolve_admin_stages(self, stages: Sequence[str] | None) -> list[str]:
        if stages is None:
            return sorted(self._stages)
        resolved = list(stages)
        unknown = sorted(set(resolved) - set(self._stages))
        if unknown:
            raise ValueError(f"Unknown admin target stage(s): {unknown}")
        return resolved

    def _aggregate_admin_results(
        self,
        *,
        op_id: str,
        action: str,
        results: list[AdminResult],
    ) -> dict[str, Any]:
        updated_results = [
            item
            for item in results
            if not item.data.get("skipped") and not item.data.get("unsupported")
        ]
        if is_update_action(action):
            success = bool(updated_results) and all(
                item.success for item in updated_results
            )
        else:
            success = all(item.success for item in results)

        errors = [item.error for item in results if item.error]
        if success:
            message = "ok"
        elif errors:
            message = "; ".join(errors)
        else:
            message = "admin operation did not complete successfully"

        return {
            "op_id": op_id,
            "action": action,
            "success": success,
            "message": message,
            "results": [item.to_dict() for item in results],
        }

    def get_request_info(self, request_id: str) -> RequestInfo | None:
        """Get info about a request."""
        return self._requests.get(request_id)

    def _resolve_terminal_stages(self, request: OmniRequest) -> set[str]:
        if self._terminal_stages_resolver is None:
            return set(self._terminal_stages)
        resolved = self._terminal_stages_resolver(request)
        if resolved is None:
            return set(self._terminal_stages)
        if isinstance(resolved, str) or not isinstance(resolved, Sequence):
            raise ValueError(
                "terminal_stages_resolver must return a sequence of terminal "
                "stage names or None"
            )
        if not all(isinstance(stage, str) for stage in resolved):
            raise ValueError(
                "terminal_stages_resolver must return terminal stage names"
            )
        resolved_stages = set(resolved)
        if not resolved_stages:
            raise ValueError("terminal_stages_resolver returned no terminal stages")
        unknown = resolved_stages - self._terminal_stages
        if unknown:
            raise ValueError(
                "terminal_stages_resolver returned stages outside the static "
                f"terminal stages: {sorted(unknown)}. Allowed terminal stages: "
                f"{sorted(self._terminal_stages)}"
            )
        return resolved_stages

    def _expected_terminal_stages(self, request_id: str) -> set[str]:
        info = self._requests.get(request_id)
        if info is None or info.terminal_stages is None:
            return set(self._terminal_stages)
        return info.terminal_stages

    def health(self) -> dict[str, Any]:
        """Return health status."""
        state_counts = {}
        for info in self._requests.values():
            state = info.state.value
            state_counts[state] = state_counts.get(state, 0) + 1

        return {
            "running": self._running,
            "stages": list(self._stages.keys()),
            "entry_stage": self.entry_stage,
            "total_requests": len(self._requests),
            "pending_completions": len(self._completion_futures),
            "request_states": state_counts,
        }


async def run_coordinator(
    completion_endpoint: str,
    abort_endpoint: str,
    entry_stage: str,
    stages: dict[str, str],  # name -> endpoint
    terminal_stages: list[str] | None = None,
    terminal_stages_resolver: Callable[[OmniRequest], list[str] | None] | None = None,
) -> Coordinator:
    """Create and start a coordinator.

    Args:
        completion_endpoint: ZMQ endpoint to receive completions
        abort_endpoint: ZMQ endpoint for abort broadcasts
        entry_stage: Name of the entry stage
        stages: Dict of stage_name -> stage_endpoint
        terminal_stages: Optional list of terminal stage names for multi-terminal merge

    Returns:
        Started Coordinator instance
    """
    coordinator = Coordinator(
        completion_endpoint=completion_endpoint,
        abort_endpoint=abort_endpoint,
        entry_stage=entry_stage,
        terminal_stages=terminal_stages,
        terminal_stages_resolver=terminal_stages_resolver,
    )

    # Register stages
    for name, endpoint in stages.items():
        coordinator.register_stage(name, endpoint)

    # Start
    await coordinator.start()

    return coordinator

1	# SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
2	"""Stage — IO shell for pipeline processing.
3	
4	Handles: control plane messaging, data plane (relay) IO, input aggregation,
5	stream chunk routing, abort tracking, profiling.
6	
7	Dispatches all compute to scheduler (OmniScheduler or SimpleScheduler).
8	"""
9	from __future__ import annotations
10	
11	import asyncio
12	import inspect
13	import logging
14	import os
15	import queue as _queue_mod
16	import threading
17	from contextlib import suppress
18	from typing import Any, Awaitable, Callable, Literal
19	
20	import torch

22	from sglang_omni.comm import stage_io
23	from sglang_omni.comm.data_ref import DataRef
24	from sglang_omni.comm.engine import CommEngine
25	from sglang_omni.comm.router import CommRouter
26	from sglang_omni.pipeline.stage.input import DirectInput, InputHandler
27	from sglang_omni.pipeline.stage.stream_queue import StreamItem, StreamQueue
28	from sglang_omni.pipeline.tp_control import TPLeaderFanout, TPWorkMessage
29	from sglang_omni.profiler.event_recorder import emit as _emit_event
30	from sglang_omni.profiler.event_recorder import get_recorder as _get_recorder
31	from sglang_omni.profiler.event_recorder import set_active_stage as _set_active_stage
32	from sglang_omni.profiler.torch_profiler import TorchProfiler
33	from sglang_omni.proto import (
34	    AdminMessage,
35	    AdminResult,
36	    AdminResultMessage,
37	    CompleteMessage,
