47	)
48	from sglang_omni.relay.base import Relay
49	from sglang_omni.scheduling.messages import IncomingMessage
50	
51	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
52	
53	GetNextFn = Callable[[str, Any], str | list[str] | None]
54	GetStreamDoneTargetsFn = Callable[[str, Any], str | list[str] | None]
55	
56	
57	def _error_text(exc: BaseException) -> str:
58	    return str(exc) or type(exc).__name__
59	
60	
61	class Stage:
62	    """IO shell for one pipeline stage.
63	
64	    All stage compute is dispatched through the scheduler inbox/outbox
65	    contract, independent of scheduler implementation.
66	
67	    Note on ``role``: ``role="single"`` means this stage owns its own ZMQ
68	    control plane and relay reader (i.e. it is NOT a TP follower). It does
69	    **not** imply this stage has its OS process to itself — since the
70	    declarative topology PR, multiple ``role="single"`` stages can share
71	    one OS process (and one asyncio event loop). When they do, they share
72	    a failure domain: see ``_run_process`` in ``stage_workers.py``.
73	    ``role="leader"`` / ``role="follower"`` continue to denote TP rank 0
74	    vs rank > 0 within a multi-rank TP stage; TP stages must own their OS
75	    process exclusively.
76	    """
77	
78	    def __init__(
79	        self,
80	        name: str,
81	        role: Literal["single", "leader", "follower"],
82	        get_next: GetNextFn,
83	        gpu_id: int | None,
84	        endpoints: dict[str, str],
85	        control_plane: Any,
86	        placement_gpu_id: int | None = None,
87	        input_handler: InputHandler | None = None,
88	        relay: Relay | None = None,
89	        comm_config: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
90	        scheduler: Any = None,
91	        project_payload: dict[str, Callable[[Any], Any]] | None = None,
92	        stream_targets: list[str] | None = None,
93	        get_stream_done_targets: GetStreamDoneTargetsFn | None = None,
94	        gpu_stage_names: set[str] | None = None,
95	        stage_gpu_ids: dict[str, tuple[int, ...]] | None = None,
96	        remote_stage_names: set[str] | None = None,
97	        same_process_targets: set[str] | None = None,
98	        local_dispatcher: Any | None = None,
99	        can_accept_stream_before_payload: bool = False,
100	        disable_direct_cuda_ipc_payload: bool = False,
101	        tp_fanout: TPLeaderFanout | None = None,
102	        is_terminal: bool = False,
103	    ):
104	        self.name = name
105	        self.role = role
106	        self.get_next = get_next
107	        self.gpu_id = gpu_id
108	        self.endpoints = endpoints
109	        self.control_plane = control_plane
110	        self.input_handler = input_handler or DirectInput()
111	        self.scheduler = scheduler
112	        self._project_payload = project_payload or {}
113	        self._stream_targets = stream_targets or []
114	        self.get_stream_done_targets = get_stream_done_targets
115	        self._same_process_targets = same_process_targets or set()
116	        self._local_dispatcher = local_dispatcher
117	        self._can_accept_stream_before_payload = can_accept_stream_before_payload
118	        self._disable_direct_cuda_ipc_payload = disable_direct_cuda_ipc_payload
119	        self._tp_fanout = tp_fanout
120	        self._is_terminal = is_terminal
121	        self._owns_external_io = role in {"single", "leader"}
122	
123	        self._comm = CommEngine(
124	            CommRouter(
125	                stage_name=name,
126	                gpu_id=self.gpu_id,
127	                placement_gpu_id=placement_gpu_id,
128	                same_process_targets=self._same_process_targets,
129	                gpu_stage_names=gpu_stage_names or set(),
130	                stage_gpu_ids=stage_gpu_ids,
131	                remote_stage_names=remote_stage_names or set(),
132	                comm_config=comm_config or {},
133	                injected_relay=relay,
134	            ),
135	            task_done_callback=self._on_background_task_done,
136	        )
137	
138	        self._running = False
139	        self._aborted: set[str] = set()
140	        self._active_requests: set[str] = set()
141	        self._stream_queue: StreamQueue | None = None
142	        self._stream_chunk_counters: dict[tuple[str, str], int] = {}
143	        self._first_stream_chunk_seen: set[str] = set()
144	        self._local_stream_targets: dict[str, set[str]] = {}
145	        self._nonlocal_stream_targets: dict[str, set[str]] = {}
146	        self._receive_tasks: set[asyncio.Task] = set()
147	        self._receive_lane_tails: dict[tuple[str, str], asyncio.Future[None]] = {}
148	        self._scheduler_thread: threading.Thread | None = None
149	        self._loop: asyncio.AbstractEventLoop | None = None
150	        self._scheduler_crash_error: BaseException | None = None
151	        self._background_task_error: BaseException | None = None
152	
153	    async def start(self) -> None:
154	        if self._running:
155	            return
156	        await self.control_plane.start()
157	        self._loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
158	        self._running = True
159	
160	        # Start scheduler in dedicated thread
161	        if self.scheduler is not None:
162	
163	            def _run_scheduler():
164	                # Active-stage binding so ``emit(stage=None)`` from
165	                # scheduler-thread descendants resolves to this stage.
166	                _set_active_stage(self.name)
167	                try:
168	                    if self.gpu_id is not None:
169	                        import torch
170	
171	                        torch.cuda.set_device(int(self.gpu_id))
172	                        logger.info(
173	                            "Scheduler thread for stage %s set CUDA device to %s",
174	                            self.name,
175	                            self.gpu_id,
176	                        )
177	                    self.scheduler.start()
178	                except Exception as exc:
179	                    logger.exception("Scheduler thread for stage %s crashed", self.name)
180	                    self._running = False
181	                    loop = self._loop
182	                    if loop is not None and not loop.is_closed():
183	                        asyncio.run_coroutine_threadsafe(
184	                            self._handle_scheduler_crash(exc),
185	                            loop,
186	                        )
187	
188	            self._scheduler_thread = threading.Thread(
189	                target=_run_scheduler,
190	                name=f"scheduler-{self.name}",
191	                daemon=True,
192	            )
193	            self._scheduler_thread.start()
194	
195	        logger.info("Stage %s started", self.name)
196	
197	    async def stop(self) -> None:
198	        self._running = False
199	        cleanup_error: Exception | None = None
200	
201	        def _record_cleanup_error(component: str, exc: Exception) -> None:
202	            nonlocal cleanup_error
203	            logger.warning(
204	                "Stage %s %s cleanup failed: %s",
205	                self.name,
206	                component,
207	                exc,
208	                exc_info=True,
209	            )
210	            if cleanup_error is None:
211	                cleanup_error = exc
212	
213	        receive_tasks = list(self._receive_tasks)
214	        for task in receive_tasks:
215	            task.cancel()
216	        await asyncio.gather(*receive_tasks, return_exceptions=True)
217	        self._receive_tasks.clear()
218	        self._receive_lane_tails.clear()
219	        if self.scheduler is not None:
220	            try:
221	                self.scheduler.stop()
222	            except Exception as exc:
223	                _record_cleanup_error("scheduler", exc)
224	        try:
225	            self.control_plane.close()
226	        except Exception as exc:
227	            _record_cleanup_error("control plane", exc)
228	        if self._tp_fanout is not None:
229	            try:
230	                self._tp_fanout.close()
231	            except Exception as exc:
232	                _record_cleanup_error("TP fanout", exc)
233	        try:
234	            self._comm.close()
235	        except Exception as exc:
236	            _record_cleanup_error("comm", exc)
237	        logger.info("Stage %s stopped", self.name)
238	        if cleanup_error is not None:
239	            raise RuntimeError(f"Stage {self.name} cleanup failed") from cleanup_error
240	
241	    async def run(self) -> None:
242	        await self.start()
243	
244	        abort_task = asyncio.create_task(self._abort_listener())
245	        outbox_task = asyncio.create_task(self._drain_outbox())
246	        abort_task.add_done_callback(
247	            lambda task: self._on_background_task_done(task, "abort listener")
248	        )
249	        outbox_task.add_done_callback(
250	            lambda task: self._on_background_task_done(task, "outbox drain")
251	        )
252	
253	        try:
254	            while self._running:
255	                msg = await self.control_plane.recv()
256	                if (
257	                    self.role == "leader"
258	                    and self._tp_fanout is not None
259	                    and isinstance(
260	                        msg,
261	                        (
262	                            ShutdownMessage,
263	                            ProfilerStartMessage,
264	                            ProfilerStopMessage,
265	                            AdminMessage,
266	                        ),
267	                    )
268	                ):
269	                    await self._tp_fanout.fanout_control(msg)
270	                if isinstance(msg, ShutdownMessage):
271	                    break
272	                if isinstance(msg, TPWorkMessage):
273	                    await self._execute(msg.data)
274	                    continue
275	                await self._handle_message(msg)
276	        except asyncio.CancelledError:
277	            pass
278	        except Exception:
279	            if self._scheduler_crash_error is None:
280	                raise
281	        finally:
282	            await self.stop()
283	            abort_task.cancel()
284	            outbox_task.cancel()
285	            with suppress(asyncio.CancelledError):
286	                await abort_task
287	            with suppress(asyncio.CancelledError):
288	                await outbox_task
289	            if self._background_task_error is not None:
290	                raise self._background_task_error
291	            if self._scheduler_crash_error is not None:
292	                raise RuntimeError(
293	                    f"Scheduler thread for stage {self.name} crashed"
294	                ) from self._scheduler_crash_error
295	
296	    async def _handle_message(self, msg: Any) -> None:
297	        if isinstance(msg, SubmitMessage):
298	            await self._on_submit(msg)
299	        elif isinstance(msg, DataAckMessage):
300	            self._comm.ack_transfer(msg)
301	        elif isinstance(msg, DataReadyMessage):
302	            self._schedule_receive_task(msg)
303	        elif isinstance(msg, ProfilerStartMessage):
304	            self._on_profiler_start(msg)
305	        elif isinstance(msg, ProfilerStopMessage):
306	            self._on_profiler_stop(msg)
307	        elif isinstance(msg, AdminMessage):
308	            await self._on_admin(msg)
309	
310	    def _schedule_receive_task(
311	        self,
312	        msg: DataReadyMessage,
313	    ) -> None:
314	        if msg.is_done or msg.error is not None:
315	            handler = self._on_stream_signal
316	            label = f"stream signal {msg.request_id}:{msg.from_stage}"
317	        elif msg.chunk_id is not None:
318	            handler = self._on_stream_chunk
319	            label = f"stream chunk {msg.request_id}:{msg.from_stage}:{msg.chunk_id}"
320	        else:
321	            handler = self._on_data_ready
322	            label = f"payload {msg.request_id}:{msg.from_stage}"
323	
324	        lane = (msg.request_id, msg.from_stage)
325	        predecessor = self._receive_lane_tails.get(lane)
326	        completion = asyncio.get_running_loop().create_future()
327	        self._receive_lane_tails[lane] = completion
328	        task = asyncio.create_task(
329	            self._run_receive_task(
330	                handler(msg, predecessor),
331	                lane,
332	                predecessor,
333	                completion,
334	            )
335	        )
336	        self._receive_tasks.add(task)
337	        task.add_done_callback(self._receive_tasks.discard)
338	        task.add_done_callback(lambda done: self._on_background_task_done(done, label))
339	
340	    async def _run_receive_task(
341	        self,
342	        coro: Awaitable[None],
343	        lane: tuple[str, str],
344	        predecessor: asyncio.Future[None] | None,
345	        completion: asyncio.Future[None],
346	    ) -> None:
347	        try:
348	            await coro
349	        finally:
350	            if predecessor is not None:
351	                await predecessor
352	            if not completion.done():
353	                completion.set_result(None)
354	            if self._receive_lane_tails.get(lane) is completion:
355	                self._receive_lane_tails.pop(lane, None)
356	
357	    @staticmethod
358	    async def _wait_for_receive_predecessor(
359	        predecessor: asyncio.Future[None] | None,
360	    ) -> None:
361	        if predecessor is not None:
362	            await predecessor
363	
364	    async def _on_submit(self, msg: SubmitMessage) -> None:
365	        request_id = msg.request_id
366	        if request_id in self._aborted:
367	            return
368	        self._active_requests.add(request_id)
369	        if self._stream_queue is not None and not self._stream_queue.has(request_id):
370	            self._stream_queue.open(request_id)
371	        _emit_event(
372	            request_id=request_id,
373	            stage=self.name,
374	            event_name="stage_input_received",
375	            metadata={"from_stage": "coordinator", "kind": "submit"},
376	        )
377	
378	        payload = msg.data  # StagePayload from coordinator
379	        await self._execute(payload)
380	
381	    async def _on_data_ready(
382	        self,
383	        msg: DataReadyMessage,
384	        predecessor: asyncio.Future[None] | None = None,
385	    ) -> None:
386	        request_id = msg.request_id
387	        if request_id in self._aborted:
388	            await self._discard_payload_data(msg)
389	            return
390	        self._active_requests.add(request_id)
391	        if self._stream_queue is not None and not self._stream_queue.has(request_id):
392	            self._stream_queue.open(request_id)
393	
394	        if stage_io.is_direct_cuda_ipc_payload_ref(msg.data_ref):
395	            try:
396	                payload = stage_io.deserialize_direct_cuda_ipc_payload(msg.data_ref)
397	            except Exception as exc:
398	                logger.exception(
399	                    "Stage %s: direct IPC payload deserialize failed for %s",
400	                    self.name,
401	                    request_id,
402	                )
403	                await self._wait_for_receive_predecessor(predecessor)
404	                await self._send_failure(
405	                    request_id, f"direct IPC payload deserialize failed: {exc}"
406	                )
407	                return
408	            await self._wait_for_receive_predecessor(predecessor)
409	            await self._receive_payload_from_stage(request_id, msg.from_stage, payload)
410	            return
411	
412	        data_ref = self._data_ref_from_message(msg)
413	        relay = self._comm.relay(data_ref.transport)
414	        try:
415	            payload = await self._comm.read_payload(
416	                relay=relay,
417	                request_id=request_id,
418	                data_ref=data_ref,
419	            )
420	        except Exception as exc:
421	            logger.exception(
422	                "Stage %s: relay read failed for %s", self.name, request_id
423	            )
424	            await self._send_data_ack(
425	                msg, data_ref, success=False, error=_error_text(exc)
426	            )
427	            relay.cleanup(request_id)
428	            await self._wait_for_receive_predecessor(predecessor)
429	            await self._send_failure(request_id, f"relay read failed: {exc}")
430	            return
431	        await self._send_data_ack(msg, data_ref, success=True)
432	
433	        await self._wait_for_receive_predecessor(predecessor)
434	        await self._receive_payload_from_stage(request_id, msg.from_stage, payload)
435	
436	    async def receive_local_payload(
437	        self,
438	        request_id: str,
439	        from_stage: str,
440	        payload: Any,
441	    ) -> None:
442	        await self._receive_payload_from_stage(request_id, from_stage, payload)
443	
444	    async def receive_local_stream_chunk(
445	        self,
446	        request_id: str,
447	        from_stage: str,
448	        chunk_id: int,
449	        data: Any,
450	        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
451	    ) -> None:
452	        if request_id in self._aborted:
453	            return
454	        self._active_requests.add(request_id)
455	        item = StreamItem(
456	            chunk_id=chunk_id,
457	            data=data,
458	            from_stage=from_stage,
459	            metadata=metadata,
460	        )
461	        self._emit_stream_chunk_received(
462	            request_id=request_id,
463	            from_stage=from_stage,
464	            chunk_id=chunk_id,
465	        )
466	        await self._route_stream_item_or_fail(request_id, item)
467	
468	    async def receive_local_stream_signal(
469	        self,
470	        request_id: str,
471	        from_stage: str,
472	        *,
473	        is_done: bool = False,
474	        error: str | None = None,
475	    ) -> None:
476	        await self._receive_stream_signal(
477	            request_id,
478	            from_stage,
479	            is_done=is_done,
480	            error=error,
481	        )
482	
483	    async def _receive_payload_from_stage(
484	        self,
485	        request_id: str,
486	        from_stage: str,
487	        payload: Any,
488	    ) -> None:
489	        if request_id in self._aborted:
490	            return
491	        self._active_requests.add(request_id)
492	        if self._stream_queue is not None and not self._stream_queue.has(request_id):
493	            self._stream_queue.open(request_id)
494	
495	        if request_id in self._aborted:
496	            return
497	
498	        _emit_event(
499	            request_id=request_id,
500	            stage=self.name,
501	            event_name="stage_input_received",
502	            metadata={"from_stage": from_stage, "kind": "payload"},
503	        )
504	        merged = self.input_handler.receive(request_id, from_stage, payload)
505	        if merged is not None:
506	            _emit_event(
507	                request_id=request_id,
508	                stage=self.name,
509	                event_name="stage_aggregate_ready",
510	                metadata={"from_stage": from_stage},
511	            )
512	            await self._execute(merged)
513	
514	    async def _on_stream_chunk(
515	        self,
516	        msg: DataReadyMessage,
517	        predecessor: asyncio.Future[None] | None = None,
518	    ) -> None:
519	        request_id = msg.request_id
520	        if request_id in self._aborted:
521	            await self._discard_stream_chunk_data(msg)
522	            return
523	        self._active_requests.add(request_id)
524	
525	        if stage_io.is_direct_cuda_ipc_stream_chunk_ref(msg.data_ref):
526	            try:
527	                data, metadata = stage_io.deserialize_direct_cuda_ipc_stream_chunk(
528	                    msg.data_ref
529	                )
530	            except Exception as exc:
531	                logger.error(
532	                    "Stage %s: direct IPC deserialize failed for %s: %s",
533	                    self.name,
534	                    request_id,
535	                    exc,
536	                )
537	                await self._wait_for_receive_predecessor(predecessor)
538	                await self._queue_stream_error(request_id, msg.from_stage, exc)
539	                return
540	            await self._wait_for_receive_predecessor(predecessor)
541	            if request_id in self._aborted:
542	                return
543	            item = StreamItem(
544	                chunk_id=msg.chunk_id,
545	                data=data,
546	                from_stage=msg.from_stage,
547	                metadata=metadata,
548	            )
549	            self._emit_stream_chunk_received(
550	                request_id=msg.request_id,
551	                from_stage=msg.from_stage,
552	                chunk_id=msg.chunk_id,
553	            )
554	            await self._route_stream_item_or_fail(request_id, item)
555	            return
556	
557	        data_ref = self._data_ref_from_message(msg)
558	        relay = self._comm.relay(data_ref.transport)
559	        try:
560	            data, metadata = await self._comm.read_stream_chunk(
561	                relay=relay,
562	                data_ref=data_ref,
563	            )
564	        except Exception as exc:
565	            logger.error(
566	                "Stage %s: stream chunk read failed for %s: %s",
567	                self.name,
568	                request_id,
569	                exc,
570	            )
571	            await self._send_data_ack(
572	                msg, data_ref, success=False, error=_error_text(exc)
573	            )
574	            await self._wait_for_receive_predecessor(predecessor)
575	            await self._queue_stream_error(request_id, msg.from_stage, exc)
576	            return
577	        await self._send_data_ack(msg, data_ref, success=True)
578	
579	        await self._wait_for_receive_predecessor(predecessor)
580	        if request_id in self._aborted:
581	            return
582	
583	        item = StreamItem(
584	            chunk_id=msg.chunk_id,
585	            data=data,
586	            from_stage=msg.from_stage,
587	            metadata=metadata,
588	        )
589	        self._emit_stream_chunk_received(
590	            request_id=msg.request_id,
591	            from_stage=msg.from_stage,
592	            chunk_id=msg.chunk_id,
593	        )
594	        await self._route_stream_item_or_fail(request_id, item)
595	
596	    def _emit_stream_chunk_received(
597	        self,
598	        *,
599	        request_id: str,
600	        from_stage: str,
601	        chunk_id: int | None,
602	    ) -> None:
603	        _emit_event(
604	            request_id=request_id,
605	            stage=self.name,
606	            event_name="stage_stream_chunk_received",
607	            metadata={"from_stage": from_stage, "chunk_id": chunk_id},
608	        )
609	
610	    async def _route_stream_item_or_fail(
611	        self, request_id: str, item: StreamItem
612	    ) -> None:
613	        if self._open_pre_payload_stream_if_allowed(request_id):
614	            self._route_stream_item(request_id, item)
615	            return
616	        with suppress(Exception):
617	            self.scheduler.abort(request_id)
618	        await self._send_failure(
619	            request_id,
620	            (
621	                f"Stage {self.name}: stream chunk from {item.from_stage!r} arrived "
622	                "before the request payload, but this stage is not configured to "
623	                "accept pre-payload stream data"
624	            ),
625	        )
626	
627	    async def _queue_stream_error(
628	        self,
629	        request_id: str,
630	        from_stage: str | None,
631	        error: BaseException,
632	    ) -> None:
633	        if request_id in self._aborted:
634	            return
635	        logger.error(
636	            "Stage %s: stream error from %s for %s: %s",
637	            self.name,
638	            from_stage,
639	            request_id,
640	            error,
641	        )
642	        with suppress(Exception):
643	            self.scheduler.abort(request_id)
644	        await self._send_failure(request_id, str(error))
645	
646	    def _data_ref_from_message(self, msg: DataReadyMessage) -> DataRef:
647	        if msg.data_ref is None:
648	            raise ValueError("data_ready message is missing transfer data_ref")
649	        return DataRef.from_dict(msg.data_ref)
650	
651	    async def _send_data_ack(
652	        self,
653	        msg: DataReadyMessage,
654	        data_ref: DataRef,
655	        *,
656	        success: bool,
657	        error: str | None = None,
658	    ) -> None:
659	        endpoint = self.endpoints.get(msg.from_stage)
660	        if endpoint is None:
661	            raise RuntimeError(
662	                f"Stage {self.name}: no endpoint configured for ack target "
663	                f"{msg.from_stage!r}"
664	            )
665	        await self.control_plane.send_to_stage(
666	            msg.from_stage,
667	            endpoint,
668	            DataAckMessage(
669	                request_id=msg.request_id,
670	                from_stage=self.name,
671	                to_stage=msg.from_stage,
672	                object_id=data_ref.object_id,
673	                success=success,
674	                error=error,
675	            ),
676	        )
677	
678	    async def _discard_payload_data(self, msg: DataReadyMessage) -> None:
679	        if stage_io.is_direct_cuda_ipc_payload_ref(msg.data_ref):
680	            imported = stage_io.deserialize_direct_cuda_ipc_payload(msg.data_ref)
681	            del imported
682	            return
683	        request_id = msg.request_id
684	        data_ref = self._data_ref_from_message(msg)
685	        relay = self._comm.relay(data_ref.transport)
686	        try:
687	            await self._comm.read_payload(
688	                relay=relay,
689	                request_id=request_id,
690	                data_ref=data_ref,
691	            )
692	        except Exception as exc:
693	            logger.debug(
694	                "Stage %s: failed to drain aborted payload for %s",
695	                self.name,
696	                request_id,
697	                exc_info=True,
698	            )
699	            await self._send_data_ack(
700	                msg, data_ref, success=False, error=_error_text(exc)
701	            )
702	            self._comm.cleanup(request_id)
703	            return
704	        await self._send_data_ack(msg, data_ref, success=True)
705	
706	    async def _discard_stream_chunk_data(self, msg: DataReadyMessage) -> None:
707	        if stage_io.is_direct_cuda_ipc_stream_chunk_ref(msg.data_ref):
708	            imported = stage_io.deserialize_direct_cuda_ipc_stream_chunk(msg.data_ref)
709	            del imported
710	            return
711	        if msg.chunk_id is None:
712	            raise ValueError("stream chunk discard requires chunk_id")
713	        data_ref = self._data_ref_from_message(msg)
714	        relay = self._comm.relay(data_ref.transport)
715	        try:
716	            await self._comm.read_stream_chunk(relay=relay, data_ref=data_ref)
717	        except Exception as exc:
718	            logger.debug(
719	                "Stage %s: failed to drain aborted stream chunk for %s",
720	                self.name,
721	                msg.request_id,
722	                exc_info=True,
723	            )
724	            await self._send_data_ack(
725	                msg, data_ref, success=False, error=_error_text(exc)
726	            )
727	            return
728	        await self._send_data_ack(msg, data_ref, success=True)
729	
730	    async def _on_stream_signal(
731	        self,
732	        msg: DataReadyMessage,
733	        predecessor: asyncio.Future[None] | None = None,
734	    ) -> None:
735	        await self._wait_for_receive_predecessor(predecessor)
736	        await self._receive_stream_signal(
737	            msg.request_id,
738	            msg.from_stage,
739	            is_done=msg.is_done,
740	            error=msg.error,
741	        )
742	
743	    async def _receive_stream_signal(
744	        self,
745	        request_id: str,
746	        from_stage: str,
747	        *,
748	        is_done: bool = False,
749	        error: str | None = None,
750	    ) -> None:
751	        if request_id in self._aborted:
752	            return
753	        self._active_requests.add(request_id)
754	        if error:
755	            await self._queue_stream_error(
756	                request_id,
757	                from_stage,
758	                RuntimeError(error),
759	            )
760	            return
761	
762	        if is_done:
763	            if not self._open_pre_payload_stream_if_allowed(request_id):
764	                with suppress(Exception):
765	                    self.scheduler.abort(request_id)
766	                await self._send_failure(
767	                    request_id,
768	                    (
769	                        f"Stage {self.name}: stream_done from {from_stage!r} "
770	                        "arrived before the request payload, but this stage is not "
771	                        "configured to accept pre-payload stream data"
772	                    ),
773	                )
774	                return
775	            self._stream_queue.put_done(request_id, from_stage=from_stage)
776	            self.scheduler.inbox.put(
777	                IncomingMessage(
778	                    request_id=request_id,
779	                    type="stream_done",
780	                )
781	            )
782	
783	    def _open_pre_payload_stream_if_allowed(self, request_id: str) -> bool:
784	        if self._stream_queue is None:
785	            return False
786	        if self._stream_queue.has(request_id):
787	            return True
788	        if not self._can_accept_stream_before_payload:
789	            return False
790	        self._active_requests.add(request_id)
791	        self._stream_queue.open(request_id)
792	        return True
793	
794	    def _route_stream_item(self, request_id: str, item: StreamItem) -> None:
795	        self.scheduler.inbox.put(
796	            IncomingMessage(request_id=request_id, type="stream_chunk", data=item)
797	        )
798	
799	    async def _execute(self, payload: Any) -> None:
800	        request_id = payload.request_id
801	        _emit_event(
802	            request_id=request_id,
803	            stage=self.name,
804	            event_name="stage_dispatch",
805	        )
806	        if (
807	            self.role == "leader"
808	            and self._tp_fanout is not None
809	            and getattr(self.scheduler, "requires_tp_work_fanout", False)
810	        ):
811	            self._tp_fanout.fanout_work(payload)
812	        self.scheduler.inbox.put(
813	            IncomingMessage(request_id=request_id, type="new_request", data=payload)
814	        )
815	
816	    async def _on_admin(self, msg: AdminMessage) -> None:
817	        operation = msg.operation
818	        if self.role == "leader" and self._tp_fanout is not None:
819	            local = await self._run_admin_operation(operation)
820	            try:
821	                follower_msgs = await self._tp_fanout.collect_admin_results(
822	                    operation.op_id,
823	                    timeout_s=float(
824	                        60.0 if operation.timeout_s is None else operation.timeout_s
825	                    ),
826	                )
827	            except Exception as exc:
828	                local.success = False
829	                local.error = str(exc)
830	                local.message = "failed to collect TP follower admin results"
831	                follower_msgs = []
832	
833	            rank_results = [local] + [item.result for item in follower_msgs]
834	            success = all(item.success for item in rank_results)
835	            errors = [item.error for item in rank_results if item.error]
836	            data = dict(local.data)
837	            data["tp_size"] = len(rank_results)
838	            data["rank_results"] = [item.to_dict() for item in rank_results]
839	            result = AdminResult(
840	                op_id=operation.op_id,
841	                stage=self.name,
842	                action=operation.action,
843	                success=success,
844	                message=(
845	                    local.message if success else "; ".join(errors) or local.message
846	                ),
847	                data=data,
848	                error=None if success else "; ".join(errors) or local.error,
849	                rank=0,
850	                role=self.role,
851	            )
852	            await self.control_plane.send_admin_result(AdminResultMessage(result))
853	            return
854	
855	        result = await self._run_admin_operation(operation)
856	        await self.control_plane.send_admin_result(AdminResultMessage(result))
857	
858	    async def _run_admin_operation(self, operation: Any) -> AdminResult:
859	        try:
860	            handler = getattr(self.scheduler, "admin", None)
861	            if handler is None:
862	                return self._admin_result(
863	                    operation,
864	                    success=True,
865	                    message="stage does not support admin operations",
866	                    data={"skipped": True, "unsupported": True},
867	                )
868	            action = operation.action
869	            payload = dict(operation.payload)
870	            loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
871	            outcome = await loop.run_in_executor(None, lambda: handler(action, payload))
872	            if inspect.isawaitable(outcome):
873	                outcome = await outcome
874	            return self._admin_result_from_outcome(operation, outcome)
875	        except Exception as exc:
876	            logger.exception(
877	                "Stage %s admin operation failed: action=%s",
878	                self.name,
879	                getattr(operation, "action", None),
880	            )
881	            return self._admin_result(
882	                operation,
883	                success=False,
884	                message=str(exc),
885	                error=str(exc),
886	            )
887	
888	    def _admin_result_from_outcome(self, operation: Any, outcome: Any) -> AdminResult:
889	        if isinstance(outcome, AdminResult):
890	            return outcome
891	        if isinstance(outcome, dict):
892	            data = dict(outcome.get("data") or {})
893	            for key, value in outcome.items():
894	                if key not in {"success", "message", "data", "error"}:
895	                    data.setdefault(key, value)
896	            return self._admin_result(
897	                operation,
898	                success=bool(outcome.get("success", True)),
899	                message=str(outcome.get("message") or "ok"),
900	                data=data,
901	                error=outcome.get("error"),
902	            )
903	        return self._admin_result(
904	            operation,
905	            success=True,
906	            message="ok",
907	            data={"result": outcome},
908	        )
909	
910	    def _admin_result(
911	        self,
912	        operation: Any,
913	        *,
914	        success: bool,
915	        message: str = "",
916	        data: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
917	        error: str | None = None,
918	    ) -> AdminResult:
919	        return AdminResult(
920	            op_id=operation.op_id,
921	            stage=self.name,
922	            action=operation.action,
923	            success=success,
924	            message=message,
925	            data=dict(data or {}),
926	            error=error,
927	            rank=getattr(self.scheduler, "tp_rank", None),
928	            role=self.role,
929	        )
930	
931	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
932	    # Outbox drain: scheduler results → route downstream
933	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
934	
935	    async def _drain_outbox(self) -> None:
936	        if self._owns_external_io:
937	            await self._drain_outbox_external()
938	        else:
939	            await self._drain_outbox_follower()
940	
941	    async def _drain_outbox_external(self) -> None:
942	        """Drain scheduler outbox and route results downstream."""
943	        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
944	        while self._running or not self.scheduler.outbox.empty():
945	            try:
946	                out = await loop.run_in_executor(
947	                    None, lambda: self.scheduler.outbox.get(timeout=0.1)
948	                )
949	            except _queue_mod.Empty:
950	                continue
951	
952	            if out.request_id not in self._active_requests:
953	                continue
954	
955	            if out.type == "result":
956	                await self._route_result(out.request_id, out.data)
957	            elif out.type == "stream":
958	                if out.target is None:
959	                    if self._stream_targets:
960	                        await asyncio.gather(
961	                            *(
962	                                self._send_stream_to_target(
963	                                    out.request_id,
964	                                    out.data,
965	                                    target,
966	                                    out.metadata,
967	                                )
968	                                for target in self._stream_targets
969	                            )
970	                        )
971	                    else:
972	                        await self._send_stream_to_coordinator(
973	                            out.request_id,
974	                            out.data,
975	                            out.metadata,
976	                        )
977	                else:
978	                    await self._send_stream_to_target(
979	                        out.request_id,
980	                        out.data,
981	                        out.target,
982	                        out.metadata,
983	                    )
984	            elif out.type == "error":
985	                await self._send_failure(out.request_id, str(out.data))
986	
987	    async def _drain_outbox_follower(self) -> None:
988	        """Drain follower outbox without emitting external stage traffic."""
989	        loop = asyncio.get_running_loop()
990	        while self._running or not self.scheduler.outbox.empty():
991	            try:
992	                out = await loop.run_in_executor(
993	                    None, lambda: self.scheduler.outbox.get(timeout=0.1)
994	                )
995	            except _queue_mod.Empty:
996	                continue
997	
998	            if out.type == "result":
999	                self._clear_request_state(out.request_id)
1000	            elif out.type == "stream":
1001	                continue
1002	            elif out.type == "error":
1003	                raise RuntimeError(
1004	                    f"TP follower stage {self.name} received scheduler error: {out.data}"
1005	                )
1006	
1007	    async def _route_result(self, request_id: str, result: Any) -> None:
1008	        """Route a completed result to next stage(s) or complete at coordinator."""
1009	        if not self._owns_external_io:
1010	            self._clear_request_state(request_id)
1011	            return
1012	        # Send stream done to the active stream targets for this request.
1013	        stream_targets = self._stream_targets
1014	        if self.get_stream_done_targets is not None:
1015	            resolved = self.get_stream_done_targets(request_id, result)
1016	            if isinstance(resolved, str):
1017	                stream_targets = [resolved]
1018	            elif isinstance(resolved, list):
1019	                stream_targets = resolved
1020	            elif resolved is None:
1021	                stream_targets = []
1022	        stream_targets_for_request = set(stream_targets)
1023	        for target in stream_targets:
1024	            await self._send_stream_signal_to_target(
1025	                request_id,
1026	                target,
1027	                is_done=True,
1028	            )
1029	
1030	        next_stages = self.get_next(request_id, result)
1031	        if next_stages is None:
1032	            # Terminal: notify coordinator
1033	            _emit_event(
1034	                request_id=request_id,
1035	                stage=self.name,
1036	                event_name="stage_complete",
1037	                metadata={"terminal": True},
1038	            )
1039	            await self.control_plane.send_complete(
1040	                CompleteMessage(
1041	                    request_id=request_id,
1042	                    from_stage=self.name,
1043	                    success=True,
1044	                    result=result.data if isinstance(result, StagePayload) else result,
1045	                )
1046	            )
1047	        else:
1048	            if isinstance(next_stages, str):
1049	                next_stages = [next_stages]
1050	            is_single_target = len(next_stages) == 1
1051	            _emit_event(
1052	                request_id=request_id,
1053	                stage=self.name,
1054	                event_name="stage_complete",
1055	                metadata={"terminal": False, "next": list(next_stages)},
1056	            )
1057	            for target in next_stages:
1058	                await self._send_to_stage(
1059	                    request_id,
1060	                    target,
1061	                    result,
1062	                    allow_local_object=is_single_target,
1063	                    allow_projected_local_object=not is_single_target,
1064	                    stream_targets_for_request=stream_targets_for_request,
1065	                )
1066	
1067	        self._clear_request_state(request_id)
1068	
1069	    async def _send_to_stage(
1070	        self,
1071	        request_id: str,
1072	        target: str,
1073	        payload: Any,
1074	        *,
1075	        allow_local_object: bool = False,
1076	        allow_projected_local_object: bool = False,
1077	        stream_targets_for_request: set[str] | None = None,
1078	    ) -> None:
1079	        if not self._owns_external_io:
1080	            raise RuntimeError(
1081	                f"Follower stage {self.name} cannot send downstream data"
1082	            )
1083	        endpoint = self.endpoints.get(target)
1084	        if endpoint is None:
1085	            raise RuntimeError(
1086	                f"Stage {self.name}: no endpoint configured for target {target!r}"
1087	            )
1088	        projector = self._project_payload.get(target)
1089	        projected_payload = projector(payload) if projector is not None else payload
1090	        use_local_object = allow_local_object or (
1091	            allow_projected_local_object
1092	            and self._is_isolated_projected_payload(
1093	                payload,
1094	                projected_payload,
1095	                projector_present=projector is not None,
1096	            )
1097	        )
1098	
1099	        if (
1100	            use_local_object
1101	            and target in self._same_process_targets
1102	            and self._can_send_full_payload_locally(
1103	                request_id,
1104	                target,
1105	                (
1106	                    set(self._stream_targets)
1107	                    if stream_targets_for_request is None
1108	                    else stream_targets_for_request
1109	                ),
1110	            )
1111	        ):
1112	            if self._local_dispatcher is None:
1113	                raise RuntimeError(
1114	                    f"Stage {self.name}: same-process target {target!r} requires "
1115	                    "a local dispatcher"
1116	                )
1117	
1118	            _emit_event(
1119	                request_id=request_id,
1120	                stage=self.name,
1121	                event_name="stage_hop_sent",
1122	                metadata={"to_stage": target, "transport": "local_object"},
1123	            )
1124	            await self._local_dispatcher.send_payload(
1125	                from_stage=self.name,
1126	                to_stage=target,
1127	                request_id=request_id,
1128	                payload=projected_payload,
1129	            )
1130	            return
1131	
1132	        can_use_direct_cuda_ipc = self._comm.router.can_use_direct_cuda_ipc(target)
1133	        if (
1134	            not self._disable_direct_cuda_ipc_payload
1135	            and can_use_direct_cuda_ipc
1136	            and stage_io.payload_has_cuda_tensor(projected_payload)
1137	        ):
1138	            try:
1139	                direct_ref = stage_io.serialize_direct_cuda_ipc_payload(
1140	                    projected_payload
1141	                )
1142	            except RuntimeError as exc:
1143	                if "received from another process" not in str(exc):
1144	                    raise
1145	            else:
1146	                await self.control_plane.send_to_stage(
1147	                    target,
1148	                    endpoint,
1149	                    DataReadyMessage(
1150	                        request_id=request_id,
1151	                        from_stage=self.name,
1152	                        to_stage=target,
1153	                        data_ref=direct_ref,
1154	                    ),
1155	                )
1156	                _emit_event(
1157	                    request_id=request_id,
1158	                    stage=self.name,
1159	                    event_name="stage_hop_sent",
1160	                    metadata={"to_stage": target, "transport": "torch_cuda_ipc"},
1161	                )
1162	                return
1163	
1164	        transport_kind, relay = self._comm.router.relay_for_payload(
1165	            target, projected_payload
1166	        )
1167	        await self._comm.send_payload(
1168	            relay=relay,
1169	            control_plane=self.control_plane,
1170	            request_id=request_id,
1171	            payload=projected_payload,
1172	            transport=transport_kind,
1173	            from_stage=self.name,
1174	            to_stage=target,
1175	            target_endpoint=endpoint,
1176	        )
1177	        _emit_event(
1178	            request_id=request_id,
1179	            stage=self.name,
1180	            event_name="stage_hop_sent",
1181	            metadata={"to_stage": target, "transport": transport_kind.value},
1182	        )
1183	
1184	    @staticmethod
1185	    def _is_isolated_projected_payload(
1186	        original_payload: Any,
1187	        projected_payload: Any,
1188	        *,
1189	        projector_present: bool,
1190	    ) -> bool:
1191	        if not projector_present or projected_payload is original_payload:
1192	            return False
1193	        if not isinstance(original_payload, StagePayload):
1194	            raise TypeError(
1195	                "projected local-object dispatch requires the original payload "
1196	                f"to be StagePayload, got {type(original_payload).__name__}"
1197	            )
1198	        if not isinstance(projected_payload, StagePayload):
1199	            raise TypeError(
1200	                "projected local-object dispatch requires projectors to return "
1201	                f"StagePayload, got {type(projected_payload).__name__}"
1202	            )
1203	        if projected_payload.data is original_payload.data:
1204	            return False
1205	        return not Stage._shares_mutable_container(
1206	            original_payload.data, projected_payload.data
1207	        )
1208	
1209	    @staticmethod
1210	    def _shares_mutable_container(original: Any, projected: Any) -> bool:
1211	        original_ids = Stage._collect_mutable_container_ids(original)
1212	        if not original_ids:
1213	            return False
1214	        return Stage._contains_mutable_container_id(projected, original_ids)
1215	
1216	    @staticmethod
1217	    def _collect_mutable_container_ids(
1218	        obj: Any, seen: set[int] | None = None
1219	    ) -> set[int]:
1220	        seen = set() if seen is None else seen
1221	        obj_id = id(obj)
1222	        if obj_id in seen:
1223	            return set()
1224	        seen.add(obj_id)
1225	
1226	        ids: set[int] = set()
1227	        if isinstance(obj, (dict, list, set, bytearray)):
1228	            ids.add(obj_id)
1229	
1230	        for child in Stage._iter_container_children(obj):
1231	            ids.update(Stage._collect_mutable_container_ids(child, seen))
1232	        return ids
1233	
1234	    @staticmethod
1235	    def _contains_mutable_container_id(
1236	        obj: Any, original_ids: set[int], seen: set[int] | None = None
1237	    ) -> bool:
1238	        seen = set() if seen is None else seen
1239	        obj_id = id(obj)
1240	        if obj_id in seen:
1241	            return False
1242	        seen.add(obj_id)
1243	
1244	        if isinstance(obj, (dict, list, set, bytearray)) and obj_id in original_ids:
1245	            return True
1246	        return any(
1247	            Stage._contains_mutable_container_id(child, original_ids, seen)
1248	            for child in Stage._iter_container_children(obj)
1249	        )
1250	
1251	    @staticmethod
1252	    def _iter_container_children(obj: Any):
1253	        if isinstance(obj, dict):
1254	            return obj.values()
1255	        if isinstance(obj, (list, tuple, set, frozenset)):
1256	            return obj
1257	        return ()
1258	
1259	    def _can_send_full_payload_locally(
1260	        self,
1261	        request_id: str,
1262	        target: str,
1263	        stream_targets_for_request: set[str],
1264	    ) -> bool:
1265	        if target in self._nonlocal_stream_targets.get(request_id, set()):
1266	            return False
1267	        if target not in stream_targets_for_request:
1268	            return True
1269	        return target in self._local_stream_targets.get(request_id, set())
1270	
1271	    def _record_local_stream_target(self, request_id: str, target: str) -> None:
1272	        self._local_stream_targets.setdefault(request_id, set()).add(target)
1273	
1274	    def _record_nonlocal_stream_target(self, request_id: str, target: str) -> None:
1275	        self._nonlocal_stream_targets.setdefault(request_id, set()).add(target)
1276	
1277	    async def _send_stream_to_target(
1278	        self,
1279	        request_id: str,
1280	        data: Any,
1281	        target: str,
1282	        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1283	    ) -> None:
1284	        if not self._owns_external_io:
1285	            return
1286	        endpoint = self.endpoints.get(target)
1287	        if endpoint is None:
1288	            raise RuntimeError(
1289	                f"Stage {self.name}: no endpoint configured for stream target "
1290	                f"{target!r}"
1291	            )
1292	        key = (request_id, target)
1293	        chunk_id = self._stream_chunk_counters.get(key, 0)
1294	        self._stream_chunk_counters[key] = chunk_id + 1
1295	        chunk_modality = (
1296	            metadata.get("modality") if isinstance(metadata, dict) else None
1297	        )
1298	        if request_id not in self._first_stream_chunk_seen:
1299	            self._first_stream_chunk_seen.add(request_id)
1300	            _emit_event(
1301	                request_id=request_id,
1302	                stage=self.name,
1303	                event_name="stage_first_stream_chunk_sent",
1304	                metadata={"to_stage": target, "modality": chunk_modality},
1305	            )
1306	        if target in self._same_process_targets:
1307	            _emit_event(
1308	                request_id=request_id,
1309	                stage=self.name,
1310	                event_name="stage_stream_chunk_sent",
1311	                metadata={
1312	                    "to_stage": target,
1313	                    "chunk_id": chunk_id,
1314	                    "modality": chunk_modality,
1315	                    "transport": "local_object",
1316	                },
1317	            )
1318	            if self._local_dispatcher is None:
1319	                raise RuntimeError(
1320	                    f"Stage {self.name}: same-process stream target {target!r} "
1321	                    "requires a local dispatcher"
1322	                )
1323	            self._record_local_stream_target(request_id, target)
1324	            await self._local_dispatcher.send_stream_chunk(
1325	                from_stage=self.name,
1326	                to_stage=target,
1327	                request_id=request_id,
1328	                chunk_id=chunk_id,
1329	                data=data,
1330	                metadata=metadata,
1331	            )
1332	            return
1333	        self._record_nonlocal_stream_target(request_id, target)
1334	        if not isinstance(data, torch.Tensor):
1335	            raise TypeError(
1336	                "relay-backed stream chunks must be torch.Tensor, got "
1337	                f"{type(data).__name__}"
1338	            )
1339	        if data.is_cuda and self._comm.router.can_use_direct_cuda_ipc(target):
1340	            direct_ref = stage_io.serialize_direct_cuda_ipc_stream_chunk(data, metadata)
1341	            _emit_event(
1342	                request_id=request_id,
1343	                stage=self.name,
1344	                event_name="stage_stream_chunk_sent",
1345	                metadata={
1346	                    "to_stage": target,
1347	                    "chunk_id": chunk_id,
1348	                    "modality": chunk_modality,
1349	                    "transport": "torch_cuda_ipc",
1350	                },
1351	            )
1352	            await self.control_plane.send_to_stage(
1353	                target,
1354	                endpoint,
1355	                DataReadyMessage(
1356	                    request_id=request_id,
1357	                    from_stage=self.name,
1358	                    to_stage=target,
1359	                    data_ref=direct_ref,
1360	                    chunk_id=chunk_id,
1361	                ),
1362	            )
1363	            return
1364	        transport_kind, relay = self._comm.router.relay_for_stream(target, data)
1365	        _emit_event(
1366	            request_id=request_id,
1367	            stage=self.name,
1368	            event_name="stage_stream_chunk_sent",
1369	            metadata={
1370	                "to_stage": target,
1371	                "chunk_id": chunk_id,
1372	                "modality": chunk_modality,
1373	                "transport": transport_kind.value,
1374	            },
1375	        )
1376	        await self._comm.send_stream_chunk(
1377	            relay=relay,
1378	            control_plane=self.control_plane,
1379	            request_id=request_id,
1380	            data=data,
1381	            target_stage=target,
1382	            target_endpoint=endpoint,
1383	            from_stage=self.name,
1384	            chunk_id=chunk_id,
1385	            metadata=metadata,
1386	            transport=transport_kind,
1387	        )
1388	
1389	    async def _send_stream_signal_to_target(
1390	        self,
1391	        request_id: str,
1392	        target: str,
1393	        *,
1394	        is_done: bool = False,
1395	        error: str | None = None,
1396	    ) -> None:
1397	        if not self._owns_external_io:
1398	            return
1399	        endpoint = self.endpoints.get(target)
1400	        if endpoint is None:
1401	            raise RuntimeError(
1402	                f"Stage {self.name}: no endpoint configured for stream target "
1403	                f"{target!r}"
1404	            )
1405	        if target in self._same_process_targets:
1406	            if self._local_dispatcher is None:
1407	                raise RuntimeError(
1408	                    f"Stage {self.name}: same-process stream target {target!r} "
1409	                    "requires a local dispatcher"
1410	                )
1411	            self._record_local_stream_target(request_id, target)
1412	            await self._local_dispatcher.send_stream_signal(
1413	                from_stage=self.name,
1414	                to_stage=target,
1415	                request_id=request_id,
1416	                is_done=is_done,
1417	                error=error,
1418	            )
1419	            return
1420	        self._record_nonlocal_stream_target(request_id, target)
1421	        await stage_io.send_stream_signal(
1422	            self.control_plane,
1423	            request_id=request_id,
1424	            target_stage=target,
1425	            target_endpoint=endpoint,
1426	            from_stage=self.name,
1427	            is_done=is_done,
1428	            error=error,
1429	        )
1430	
1431	    async def _send_stream_to_coordinator(
1432	        self,
1433	        request_id: str,
1434	        data: Any,
1435	        metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
1436	    ) -> None:
1437	        """Forward a terminal stage's stream chunk to the Coordinator."""
1438	        if not self._is_terminal:
1439	            raise RuntimeError(
1440	                f"Stage {self.name!r} emitted untargeted stream chunk but isn't "
1441	                "terminal. Set ``terminal=True``, or use ``target=...`` / "
1442	                "``stream_to=[...]``."
1443	            )
1444	        if not self._owns_external_io:
1445	            return
1446	        if request_id in self._aborted:
1447	            return
1448	        modality = metadata.get("modality") if isinstance(metadata, dict) else None
1449	        if modality is None and isinstance(data, dict):
1450	            modality = data.get("modality")
1451	        key = (request_id, "coordinator")
1452	        chunk_id = self._stream_chunk_counters.get(key, 0)
1453	        self._stream_chunk_counters[key] = chunk_id + 1
1454	        msg = StreamMessage(
1455	            request_id=request_id,
1456	            from_stage=self.name,
1457	            chunk=data,
1458	            stage_name=self.name,
1459	            modality=modality,
1460	            chunk_id=chunk_id,
1461	        )
1462	        if request_id not in self._first_stream_chunk_seen:
1463	            self._first_stream_chunk_seen.add(request_id)
1464	            _emit_event(
1465	                request_id=request_id,
1466	                stage=self.name,
1467	                event_name="stage_first_stream_chunk_sent",
1468	                metadata={
1469	                    "to_stage": "coordinator",
1470	                    "chunk_id": chunk_id,
1471	                    "modality": modality,
1472	                },
1473	            )
1474	        _emit_event(
1475	            request_id=request_id,
1476	            stage=self.name,
1477	            event_name="stage_stream_chunk_sent",
1478	            metadata={
1479	                "to_stage": "coordinator",
1480	                "chunk_id": chunk_id,
1481	                "modality": modality,
1482	            },
1483	        )
1484	        await self.control_plane.send_stream(msg)
1485	
1486	    async def _send_failure(self, request_id: str, error: str) -> None:
1487	        self._record_aborted_request_id(request_id)
1488	        if not self._owns_external_io:
1489	            self._clear_request_state(request_id)
1490	            raise RuntimeError(f"Follower stage {self.name} failed: {error}")
1491	        await self.control_plane.send_complete(
1492	            CompleteMessage(
1493	                request_id=request_id,
1494	                from_stage=self.name,
1495	                success=False,
1496	                error=error,
1497	            )
1498	        )
1499	        self._clear_request_state(request_id)
1500	
1501	    def _clear_request_state(self, request_id: str) -> None:
1502	        self._active_requests.discard(request_id)
1503	        self.input_handler.cancel(request_id)
1504	        if self._stream_queue is not None:
1505	            self._stream_queue.close(request_id)
1506	        stale_keys = [
1507	            key for key in self._stream_chunk_counters if key[0] == request_id
1508	        ]
1509	        for key in stale_keys:
1510	            self._stream_chunk_counters.pop(key, None)
1511	        self._first_stream_chunk_seen.discard(request_id)
1512	        self._local_stream_targets.pop(request_id, None)
1513	        self._nonlocal_stream_targets.pop(request_id, None)
1514	
1515	    async def _handle_scheduler_crash(self, exc: BaseException) -> None:
1516	        if self._scheduler_crash_error is not None:
1517	            return
1518	        self._scheduler_crash_error = exc
1519	        if not self._owns_external_io:
1520	            self.control_plane.close()
1521	            return
1522	        error = f"scheduler crashed: {exc}"
1523	        active_request_ids = [
1524	            request_id
1525	            for request_id in list(self._active_requests)
1526	            if request_id not in self._aborted
1527	        ]
1528	        for request_id in active_request_ids:
1529	            with suppress(Exception):
1530	                self.scheduler.abort(request_id)
1531	            await self._send_failure(request_id, error)
1532	            with suppress(Exception):
1533	                self._comm.cleanup(request_id)
1534	        self.control_plane.close()
1535	
1536	    async def _abort_listener(self) -> None:
1537	        try:
1538	            while self._running:
1539	                abort_msg = await self.control_plane.recv_abort()
1540	                if self.role == "leader" and self._tp_fanout is not None:
1541	                    await self._tp_fanout.fanout_abort(abort_msg)
1542	                self._on_abort(abort_msg.request_id)
1543	        except asyncio.CancelledError:
1544	            pass
1545	        except Exception:
1546	            if self._scheduler_crash_error is None and self._running:
1547	                logger.exception("Stage %s abort listener crashed", self.name)
1548	
1549	    def _record_aborted_request_id(self, request_id: str) -> None:
1550	        self._aborted.add(request_id)
1551	        if len(self._aborted) > 10000:
1552	            excess = len(self._aborted) - 5000
1553	            it = iter(self._aborted)
1554	            to_remove = [next(it) for _ in range(excess)]
1555	            self._aborted -= set(to_remove)
1556	
1557	    def _on_abort(self, request_id: str) -> None:
1558	        self._record_aborted_request_id(request_id)
1559	        self._comm.cleanup(request_id)
1560	        self._clear_request_state(request_id)
1561	        self.scheduler.abort(request_id)
1562	
1563	    def _on_profiler_start(self, msg: ProfilerStartMessage) -> None:
1564	        run_id = msg.run_id

1566	            base_tpl = msg.trace_path_template.format(run_id=run_id, stage=self.name)

1571	            TorchProfiler.start(template, run_id=run_id)
1572	        if msg.event_dir is not None:

1575	                    run_id=run_id, event_dir=msg.event_dir, stage=self.name
1576	                )
1577	            except Exception:
1578	                logger.warning(
1579	                    "Stage %s failed to start request event recorder",
1580	                    self.name,
1581	                    exc_info=True,
1582	                )
1583	
1584	    def _on_profiler_stop(self, msg: ProfilerStopMessage) -> None:
1585	        # run_id=None is a wildcard (stop whatever's active).
1586	        if TorchProfiler.is_active() and (
1587	            msg.run_id is None or TorchProfiler.get_active_run_id() == msg.run_id
1588	        ):
1589	            TorchProfiler.stop(run_id=msg.run_id)
1590	        recorder = _get_recorder()

1592	            msg.run_id is None or recorder.active_run_id() == msg.run_id
1593	        ):
1594	            recorder.stop(run_id=msg.run_id)
1595	
1596	    def _on_background_task_done(self, task: asyncio.Task, label: str) -> None:
1597	        if task.cancelled():
1598	            return
1599	        exc = task.exception()
1600	        if exc is None:
1601	            return

1603	            "Stage %s %s task crashed",
1604	            self.name,
1605	            label,
1606	            exc_info=(type(exc), exc, exc.__traceback__),
1607	        )
1608	        if self._background_task_error is None:
1609	            self._background_task_error = exc
1610	        self._running = False
1611	        self.control_plane.close()
